DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BAZLEY, BRUCE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, B.K. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-13-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-18-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO-TEM PETER SHERWOOD PLTF. & DEFT PRESENT, BOTH IN PRO PER 4:20 PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY JUDGE AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR THE THE PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT ROOM 320, VINCENT HOTEL, 459 TURK ST, SF, CA, 94102. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED 11/1/93 AT 5PM TO ALLOW DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES. PLTF. WAIVES RENTS/ COSTS. PLTF. TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WHEN DEFT VACATES PREMISES, IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, SHERIFF MAY EVICT DEFT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAZLEY, BRUCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: VINCENT HOTEL ROOM 320, 459 TURK ST, SF, CA 94102, STAYED UNTIL NOV-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 11/01/93 5:00 PM.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
